images.heroAlt: Marla Bakery in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: Craft Bakery in Railroad Square
sections.subheading: Artisan breads, croissants, and pastry made from locally farmed, seasonal ingredients by chef Amy Brown.
badges: Chef Amy Brown, formerly of Nopa

image.alt: Marla Bakery in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: About Marla
body: Marla is the craft bakery and cafe of chef-owner Amy Brown, who spent two decades as a bread baker and pastry chef, most recently running the pastry program at San Francisco's acclaimed Nopa, before opening Marla with her husband and partner Joe Wolf. The name is an acronym of the family members who taught them to cook and bake.

Now in Santa Rosa's historic Railroad Square, Marla's breads, pastries, cookies, tarts, cakes, and croissants reflect that experience and the abundance of where they live, with menus driven by each season and locally grown organic produce, flours, eggs, and butter.
highlights: Chef Amy Brown, formerly of Nopa
